examples.exam_en: They celebrated their wedding anniversary at a restaurant.
The country marked the 200th anniversary of its independence.
The lawyer prepared a strong defense for his client.
examples.exam_ko: 변호사는 의뢰인을 위해 강력한 변호를 준비했다.

examples.exam_en: The country increased its military defense budget.
examples.exam_ko: 그 나라는 군사 방어 예산을 늘렸다.

examples.exam_en: The new product launch was very successful.
She became a successful entrepreneur at a young age.
examples.exam_ko: 그녀는 어린 나이에 성공한 사업가가 되었다.

examples.exam_en: The government provides ongoing support to flood victims.
examples.exam_ko: 정부는 홍수 피해자들에게 지속적인 지원을 제공한다.

examples.exam_en: The investigation is still ongoing after several months.
examples.exam_ko: 수사는 몇 달이 지난 후에도 여전히 진행 중이다.

examples.exam_en: He was promoted to a senior manager position.
The senior students mentor the newcomers.
She hit the jackpot and won a million dollars.
examples.exam_ko: 그녀는 대박을 터뜨려 백만 달러를 얻었다.

examples.exam_en: He felt like he hit the jackpot when he got the job.
examples.exam_ko: 그는 그 일자리를 얻었을 때 큰 행운을 잡은 것 같았다.

examples.exam_en: She boiled water in a large pot on the stove.
examples.exam_ko: 그녀는 가스레인지 위의 큰 냄비에서 물을 끓였다.

examples.exam_en: He stirred the soup pot slowly over low heat.
examples.exam_ko: 그는 약한 불로 수프 냄비를 천천히 저었다.

examples.exam_en: She has a strong fear of heights.
He was overcome by fear during the earthquake.
examples.exam_ko: 그는 지진이 발생하는 동안 공포에 질렸다.

examples.exam_en: He dived into the ocean to search for pearls.
The children dived into the pool one by one.
They left the village before daybreak.
The soldiers marched out at daybreak.
They worked only during daylight hours.
The robbery happened in broad daylight.
The ballet dancer moved in a graceful way.
She gave a graceful bow to the audience.
A fearful storm hit the coast last night.
The children were fearful of the dark forest.
He gave a thoughtful answer to the question.
examples.exam_ko: 그는 질문에 사려 깊은 답변을 했다.

examples.exam_en: It was very thoughtful of her to send flowers.
examples.exam_ko: 꽃을 보내준 그녀의 행동은 매우 배려 깊은 것이었다.

examples.exam_en: His motive for helping seemed doubtful to everyone.
It is doubtful whether he will arrive on time.
I am extremely thankful to him for his help.
She was thankful to breathe the fresh air.
examples.exam_ko: 그녀는 신선한 공기를 마실 수 있어서 기뻤다.

examples.exam_en: Be careful when crossing the busy street.
You should be more careful with your belongings.
It was very helpful of you to type the manuscript.
examples.exam_ko: 원고를 타이핑해 주신 것이 정말 도움이 됐습니다.

examples.exam_en: This map is helpful for finding the location.
examples.exam_ko: 이 지도는 위치를 찾는 데 도움이 된다.

examples.exam_en: I don't know whether he will succeed.
examples.exam_ko: 그가 성공할지 어떨지 알 수 없다.

examples.exam_en: She can't decide whether to stay or leave.
examples.exam_ko: 그녀는 머물지 떠날지 결정하지 못하고 있다.

examples.exam_en: He purchased a new car for five thousand dollars.
She purchased a new coat for her daughter.
